title: The transformational process
summary: 9609 AS — inputs, processes, outputs, and adding value in operations.
learningObjectives: Apply the model to service and manufacturing firms.

simpleExplanation.title: Turning inputs into outputs
simpleExplanation.summary: Operations transform resources into goods or services customers will pay for, adding value in the process.
steps: Value added = output value − input cost.

sections.content: **Transformational process** (4.1.1) opens **Topic 4 Operations**. Use **case examples** for inputs and outputs.
